insights.title: exportState does not visually refresh key/table display after restore
insights.summary: After calling exportState/restoreState on a KeyNumber modulator, the note-value assignments or table data are saved and restored correctly, but the UI graphics are not updated until the user makes a manual change to the modulator. This means the display can show stale values while the engine uses the correct ones.
insights.verify_hint: grep exportState or restoreState in KeyNumberModulator source; check if repaint/update is triggered after state restore

insights.title: Prefer Array Modulator over KeyNumber for per-note value mapping
insights.summary: The Array Modulator provides the same per-note value mapping capability as KeyNumber but with a more convenient interface. Christoph Hart (the author) recommends it as the preferred alternative.

insights.title: KeyNumber sub-modulator state is restored correctly via parent modulator restore
insights.summary: When KeyNumber is used as a sub-modulator inside a parent modulator chain, restoring the parent modulator's state also correctly restores the KeyNumber sub-modulator. The visual glitch (stale graphics) is still present, but the data integrity is intact.
